text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the arrival of the new year, I join Inari One
on a visit to a shrine in her hometown...

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Hey, if it isn't Inari! You were really somethin' at
the Tokyo Daishoten! Keep it up for the spring
Tenno Sho, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Thanks! I got a bigger surprise in store this year,
so stay tuned!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Inari! You looked so cool runnin' in the
Daishoten! Don't forget to stop by the shop!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Thanks a lot! I promise to come with all my pals
from Tracen!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. It's so motivating knowin' everyone's got
well-wishes for me.
choice_data_list:
Makes you want to perform extra good for your
senior year, doesn't it?

Makes you want to perform extra good for your
senior year, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Yup! Can't wait to scrap on the track. My body's
been achin' for a fight!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh. It's our turn to make our prayers, Boss.
What's yours gonna be?
choice_data_list: For you to shine with a healthy glow!
For us to reach the top with a bang and a flash!
For us to reach the top with a bang and a flash!
Evil spirits, begone!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh. It's our turn to make our prayers, Boss.
What's yours gonna be?
choice_data_list: For you to shine with a healthy glow!
For us to reach the top with a bang and a flash!
For us to reach the top with a bang and a flash!
Evil spirits, begone!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're hopin' I'll have a clean bill of health? Then
what's gonna happen to you? You'll be totally
exposed!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're hopin' I'll have a clean bill of health? Then
what's gonna happen to you? You'll be totally
exposed!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I know, I'll pray on your behalf. Problem solved!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I know, I'll pray on your behalf. Problem solved!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of us pray for each other's health
and safety.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, makes sense. Our dream to reach the top is
one steep demand, though! Won't come true so
easily.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's why we better double up on the
prayer—you and me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we both pray for us to reach the top in
her senior year.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Pfft, hahaha! Whazzat s'posed to be?! Tryna
gimme the first laugh of the year, eh? Well, nice
work!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
But I hear ya! Don't want any nasty spirits
knockin' on our doorstep! Let's double up the
prayer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the two of us pray to be kept out of
harm's way.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finished with our prayers, we head to the
shopping district. There, plenty of locals are
seated outside, happily eating away.

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Oh, look who's here! It's the pride of Oi, and with
her trainer to boot! Heya, Inari!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: Inari! You had lunch yet? Come eat with me!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, I could go for some grub! Thanks a ton!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take a seat over there. There's plenty
to go 'round, so grab a plate, Boss!
choice_data_list: Yeah, I'll do that.
Yeah, I'll do that.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna take a seat over there. There's plenty
to go 'round, so grab a plate, Boss!
choice_data_list: Yeah, I'll do that.
Yeah, I'll do that.

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
We were just talkin' about you, Inari. Your run at
the Tokyo Daishoten blew me away!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Inari! You see this magazine?! You're not gonna
believe what it says!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
"Inari One plans to shake things up in her senior
year! Her goal—becoming Umamusume of the
Year! Is a showdown between her and Oguri Cap
imminent?!"

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
They're gonna show last year's highlights on TV
later. We're thinkin' of hostin' a big watch party
for it!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
I bet you're gonna be there! I mean, with all the
noise you made, you have to be!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I might start blushin' at that! Hope they
only show my cool moments!

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. Happy New Year to ya.
choice_data_list: Chief! Thanks for all your help last year.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Heh, I should be thanking you. 'Cause of you two,
my team's more motivated than ever.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
The moment they heard your plans to kick up a
festival in Oi, it's been a frenzy. I've been bustin'
my old butt helpin' to prepare.

text_block_list.name: Chief
text_block_list.text:
Rest up a while, ya hear? We've got our eye on
you too, not just Inari.
choice_data_list: Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I have a delightful time eating with all the
locals.

text_block_list.name: TV Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
And now, let's look back on some of the greatest
moments last year in the Twinkle Series!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text: Hey, it's startin'!

text_block_list.name: TV Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
The first person that comes to mind is the Beast
herself, Oguri Cap! She's appeared in quite a few
major races!

text_block_list.name: TV Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
Could she be the most popular Umamusume on
the scene? I instantly became a fan after seeing
her race in person!

text_block_list.name: TV Female Reporter
text_block_list.text:
At last year's Arima Kinen, she went toe-to-toe
with Tamamo Cross, aka White Lightning!

text_block_list.name: TV Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
It was certainly a defining race of their year. It'll
be hard to top such an unforgettable
performance!

text_block_list.name: TV Male Reporter
text_block_list.text:
In the run-up to that Arima Kinen, Oguri Cap and
Tamamo Cross had also faced off in the autumn
Tenno Sho...

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
What? How long're they gonna keep goin' on
about the Arima Kinen? When'll they start talkin'
about Inari?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The show continues to focus on Oguri Cap and
her performance in the central graded races
before eventually wrapping up...

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
Geez, that was nothing but central races. Makes
no sense when the Tokyo Daishoten and Japan
Dirt Derby were just as good.

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text:
That's... totally unacceptable! Inari had an
amazin' race, and they completely ignored it!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: So what?!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text: I-Inari?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Gimme a break, everyone! It's too early in the
year to be lookin' sour!

text_block_list.name: Racer with Purple Scrunchie
text_block_list.text: But Inari...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Whazza matter, you need a reminder? This'll be the year that I—as the regional runner—take on those central big shots!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'll become Umamusume of the Year and show 'em
all the heart of the regional races and its runners!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Those central losers got nothin' on us!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's what today's supposed to be about! So
brighten up, guys! Let's go wild and have a blast!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It's time for a festival!

text_block_list.name: Townsman
text_block_list.text:
...That's right! Inari made the trip to come see us!
This is no time to be glum!

text_block_list.name: Townswoman
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we can't be here complainin' 'bout this 'n'
that—not when Inari's tryna do her best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One's powerful speech lifts the spirits of
everyone, and the festivities continue with some
much-needed joy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The locals give us some nice little gifts and send
us off on our journey back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Boss, thanks for taggin' along today. I had a lot
of fun with ya around.
choice_data_list: Everyone was so ecstatic to see you.
Everyone was so ecstatic to see you.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Boss, thanks for taggin' along today. I had a lot
of fun with you around.
choice_data_list: Everyone was so ecstatic to see you.
Everyone was so ecstatic to see you.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I have to win.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'll make it to the top. I have to become Umamusume of the Year.
choice_data_list: Inari...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Chief and the ol' team praised my performance in
the Japan Dirt Derby and the Tokyo Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
And all the neighborhood folks... they've put their
faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: They gave me somethin'—this burning sensation!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I... gotta repay the favor!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
I'm not lettin' even one of their feelings go to
waste! That's why...
choice_data_list: We'll make you Umamusume of the Year.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Boss...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One feels a deep bond with her hometown.
It's where her sense of duty comes from. I want to
share that burden.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After all...
choice_data_list: We're partners, aren't we?
We're partners, aren't we?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh, ya really know when to throw a punch.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Heh, ya really know when to throw a punch.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: I'm countin' on ya, partner.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You and me... we're gonna be fightin' down a long
and winding road!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With renewed resolve, we start off her senior year
swinging!
